news.headline: More jobs for the elderly: Shanghai eyes senior labour force amid China demographic crisis
news.summary:
Qiu has been scouring Shanghai’s labour agencies for a job for her 58-year-old father – a former mechanic from neighbouring Jiangsu province caught in a frustrating limbo.

news.headline: Bodies of 50 infants dumped at Trinidad graveyard
news.summary: Police say a preliminary investigation shows it may be a case of an "unlawful disposal of unclaimed corpses".

news.headline: Pope says 'tyrants' speech was not aimed at Trump
news.summary: The pontiff says his remarks have been misinterpreted after a spat with the US president.
